name: feature.advisory-board.nodes
description: Board of Advisors feature node pack (ADR 0040 / ADR 0014) — a single READ node over the ctx.features['advisory-board'] surface shipped by the Board of Advisors feature package. list-boards lists the workspace's SHARED advisory boards (cohort: boardId, name, handle, advisors) so a workflow can enumerate councils. The boardroom CONVERSATION itself runs on the existing AI chat (chat.turn, ADR 0040 § Correction 2026-06-15), NOT a node-side convene. Read-only — role:action (recorded → replay/fork-safe); tenant-internal (shared boards only).
author: OpenWOP App

nodes.label: Advisory Board: List Boards
nodes.description: Lists the workspace's shared advisory boards (boardId, name, handle, advisors) over ctx.features['advisory-board'].listBoards. Output: { boards }. Tenant-internal (shared boards only). Read-only.
